actions.name: create_submission

template_id.description: The unique identifier of the template to create a submission (signature request) from.

send_email.description: Set false to disable signature request emails sending.

send_sms.description: Set true to send the signature request via phone number SMS.

order.description: Signing order across submitters; 'preserved' (default) sends the next request only after the prior party signs.

completed_redirect_url.description: URL to redirect to after submission completion.

bcc_completed.description: BCC address to send signed documents to after completion.

reply_to.description: Reply-To address for the notification emails.

expire_at.description: Expiration date/time after which the submission becomes unavailable for signature.

variables.description: Dynamic content variables object for dynamic template documents.

submitters.description: The list of submitters (signers) for the submission.

actions.risk: external mutation; dispatches a live signature-request email/SMS to every listed submitter unless send_email/send_sms are explicitly set false; approval required

actions.name: archive_submission
actions.risk: external mutation; archives a live DocuSeal submission (soft-delete, still recoverable via the DocuSeal UI); approval required

actions.name: update_submitter

send_email.description: Set true to re-send signature request emails.

completed.description: Pass true to mark this submitter as completed and auto-signed via API.

actions.risk: external mutation; overwrites a live DocuSeal submitter's pre-filled values/contact info, can re-send signature request notifications, and can force-mark the submitter completed/auto-signed; approval required

actions.name: update_template

archived.description: Set false to unarchive a previously archived template.

actions.risk: external mutation; renames/moves/relabels a live DocuSeal template and can unarchive it; approval required

actions.name: archive_template
actions.risk: external mutation; archives a live DocuSeal template (soft-delete, recoverable by unarchiving via update_template); approval required

actions.name: clone_template

id.description: The unique identifier of the template to clone.

name.description: Name for the cloned template; defaults to the source name + ' (Clone)' when unset.

actions.risk: external mutation; creates a new live DocuSeal template by cloning an existing one; approval required
